Name: -1_good_think_taste_fashion
Representative_Docs: ['When I think of someone who has good taste, I think of someone who is trendy, and most people would admire them for their good taste.  I think they would take pride in thier appearance and their surroundings.  They just look good overall.  Trendsetters.', 'If I say someone has good taste it means I agree with their sense of style. I think that what they have put together flows well and is cohesive rather than clashes and seems out if place. This applies to fashion and decor. It also might mean they like the same forms of media that I do for the same reasons. Or the same forms of entertainment. It means that I believe that they think similar to me.', 'When I say they have good taste, it usually means that they tends to appreciate subtle details in the object. For example, a person that have a good taste in fashion would dress in a way that elevate their body features and while the fabric/pattern/fit might be eccentric and different then, it would still go together.']

Name: 0_taste_good_person_like
Representative_Docs: ['I’d say a person has good taste if I like similar things.', 'Someone that has generally liked opinion on certain topics, usually something that aligns with my taste because I like to think my taste is good taste.  They have good taste and they like things that most and I like so they have good taste.', 'When I say that someone has good taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is similar to what I like, so, therefore, they have good taste.']

Name: 1_like_things_art_good
Representative_Docs: ['Generally it means I agree with their aesthetic choices and they choose things that look good.', 'The things they like are aesthetically pleasing. They understand how things go together.
